overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit futuristic urban environment at night. The player moves from an outdoor street beneath a massive yellow industrial overpass up a staircase into an indoor market corridor with holographic advertisements and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street beneath industrial overpass

events.description: approaching the staircase entrance beneath the yellow industrial structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk toward a staircase beneath a massive yellow industrial overpass, passing illuminated billboards

entered.detail: massive yellow steel structure with diagonal support beams spanning overhead
large illuminated advertisement showing 'NEW HERO' text with vehicle imagery
vertical digital billboard displaying 'PONCHES' with a face graphic
tall pole with bright spotlight illuminating the area
horizontal cyan neon lights lining the distant structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark futuristic street at night beneath a massive yellow industrial overpass. The camera moves forward past illuminated billboards advertising 'NEW HERO' and 'PONCHES' while approaching a staircase entrance. The area is devoid of pedestrians, with only the artificial lighting from street lamps and neon strips visible.

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the indoor corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while passing a rotating green holographic advertisement cube

entered.detail: rotating transparent cube displaying green neon advertisement with human figure
wide staircase with embedded lighting strips on the edges
yellow painted metal handrails along the staircase
illuminated sign with Japanese text '空室あり' (vacancy available)

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete staircase beneath the yellow overpass structure. A rotating green holographic advertisement cube floats near the stairs, displaying a figure in neon light. At the top of the stairs, a Japanese vacancy sign becomes visible as the environment transitions from outdoor to indoor.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor commercial corridor with vending machines

events.description: encounters first pedestrians in the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper level corridor passing by a vending machine and potted plants, approaching distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking away from camera down the corridor

entered.detail: wide indoor passage with exposed ceiling beams and industrial lighting
illuminated beverage dispenser with glowing interface
large planter with greenery and wooden support stakes nearby
closed security grilles covering storefronts at the corridor end
digital advertisement showing 'NEW JAW GET AN UPGRADE' with medical imagery

segments.scene_description: Entering the indoor corridor, the scene reveals a commercial passageway with concrete walls and exposed industrial ceiling. A vending machine glows on the right while potted plants sit nearby. The vacancy sign remains visible on the left as the camera approaches distant pedestrians and closed metal security shutters.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground market area with food stalls and industrial piping

events.description: passes a food vendor standing behind a counter on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating past a food stall and large industrial ventilation pipes while moving through the market area

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue shirt standing behind food stall counter

entered.detail: service counter with equipment and glowing red neon signage above
massive curved ventilation ducts stacked vertically along the wall
exposed ceiling infrastructure with mesh grating and piping
red illuminated signs above the food stall area
closed rolling shutters protecting storefronts

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a market area featuring a food stall with a vendor behind the counter on the left. Large industrial ventilation pipes dominate the left wall, while metal security grilles cover the storefronts ahead. The camera moves past the vendor and continues through the dimly lit commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper transit area with large overhead billboard

events.description: large illuminated 'HOLT' billboard becomes visible overhead
approaching the top of a ramp with yellow stairs visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large overhead advertisement billboard while ascending a gentle ramp, with a pedestrian in yellow visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking up the ramp ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement displaying 'HOLT' with a portrait and text 'The Real You'
multiple digital billboards lining the far wall with various advertisements
gentle sloping walkway with yellow painted lines on the floor
staircase with yellow painted edges leading to upper level
pile of garbage bags and scattered debris near the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a larger transit area with a massive 'HOLT' billboard illuminated overhead. The camera ascends a concrete ramp toward an array of advertisement screens and yellow stairs in the distance. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks ahead, and the green holographic advertisement cube reappears in the center of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a desolate, neon-lit street beneath a massive industrial structure into a crowded indoor commercial corridor. It begins on a dark futuristic road under a towering yellow overpass, gliding past illuminated billboards for New Hero and Ponches. As the camera reaches a staircase, it ascends beneath the yellow structure, passing a rotating green holographic cube before the environment shifts from the open night air toward a Japanese vacancy sign. The scene then opens into an indoor passageway characterized by concrete walls and exposed ceilings, where the lighting transitions to the glow of a vending machine and nearby potted plants. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the corridor, passing the vacancy sign on the left as it approaches distant pedestrians and closed metal security shutters.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, industrial market corridor into a vast, neon-lit transit hub. It begins by gliding past a food stall vendor on the left, moving beneath massive industrial ventilation pipes and past metal security grilles that line the dimly lit commercial space. As the camera pushes forward, the confined corridor opens into a larger area dominated by a massive, illuminated HOLT billboard overhead. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a concrete ramp, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket toward distant yellow stairs and a cluster of advertisement screens. Finally, the view expands across the walkway, centering on a glowing green holographic advertisement cube.
